artifact_identity.prompt_identity: Reject a plain-text final result and keep the repair bounded.
artifact_identity.task_identity: Reject a plain-text final result and keep the repair bounded.

structural_decision_trace.why: the final result artifact is missing or not parseable
the modified-files section is present in the final result artifact
diff or provenance evidence is missing from the final result artifact
baseline, surface, prompt, and task identity fields are all present
cleanup status is missing from the final result artifact

semantic_decision_trace.why: the modified-files list is empty, malformed, or does not name concrete changed files
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record the actual changed files in the final result artifact

semantic_decision_trace.why: diff or provenance evidence is present but too thin to prove the change
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: capture non-empty diff or provenance evidence for the changed files

semantic_decision_trace.why: readback evidence is too thin to confirm the changed surface
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record substantive readback from the changed sections on the attested surface

semantic_decision_trace.why: scenario-proof evidence is too thin to confirm the target scenario outcome
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record an explicit scenario-proof result for the attested target surface

semantic_decision_trace.why: baseline, surface, prompt, and task identity fields are all non-empty
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: repair baseline, surface, prompt, and task identity fields

semantic_decision_trace.why: cleanup status is present but does not prove successful cleanup
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record a successful cleanup status for the execution surface
